description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a long, slender barrel and a distinctively angled grip, reminiscent of classic European pistol designs. The frame and slide are finished in a matte black, while the grip panels are a dark brown with horizontal ribbing for enhanced hold. The trigger guard is rounded and spacious, providing ample room for finger placement, and the barrel features a threaded muzzle, possibly for attaching a suppressor or compensator. Subtle markings are visible on the slide, including what appears to be a serial number or model designation. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a long barrel, ribbed brown grip, and a threaded muzzle. The design is sleek and classic, with subtle slide markings and a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, ribbed brown grip, and visible slide markings.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular muzzle opening and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, slide, and the threaded barrel end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the alignment of the slide and barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is sharply angled and features horizontal ribbing along its length, providing a textured, non-slip surface. It is constructed from a dark brown material, likely wood or polymer, and is contoured to fit comfortably in the hand. The grip lacks finger grooves but has a slight palm swell for ergonomic support. No visible logos or embellishments are present, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth, continuous curve that offers ample space for finger placement. It does not feature any undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories, and there is no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a classic and functional design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and slender with a threaded muzzle, suggesting compatibility with suppressors or compensators. The profile is straight and unfluted, and the exterior has a matte black finish. No compensator ports or fluting are visible, and the threading at the muzzle is the most distinctive feature.
attribute_slide_markings: There are subtle markings on the slide, including what appears to be a serial number or model designation located above the grip area. The markings are small, engraved, and not highly prominent, blending into the matte black finish of the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extension, bevel, or flare. It maintains a streamlined profile and does not feature any finger rests, logos, or additional texturing, contributing to the overall minimalist design.
